title: Baozhuo Su
text:
Baozhuo Su
Welcome to my personal website.

title: Papers
text:
Papers
Divergence-Optimized Data Fusion that Enhances AI-Based Electrocardiogram Arrhythmia Detection Accurate arrhythmia detection using artificial intelligence remains a significant challenge, particularly when training data are limited in size and heterogeneous in origin. To address this issue, we present a novel data fusion strategy that leverages gradient descent optimization to minimize the Kullback– Leibler divergence between feature distributions across datasets from different sources. We evaluate this approach using a combination of in-house electrocardiogram (ECG) recordings collected from both healthy and diseased individuals using various machines and a subset of data extracted from the publicly available PTB-XL dataset. Binary classification is performed using Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM) and eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) models. Applying the fusion strategy leads to consistently higher classification accuracy on both in-house and PTB-XL datasets compared to standard normalization methods. These results suggest that aligning feature distributions across datasets can improve arrhythmia classification and offer a generalizable strategy for integrating heterogeneous clinical data in machine-learning models.
